slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

shape.trace: ProjectLabeler(mock_data_store).set_label('proj-1','freelancer-42','client-acme') calls self._store.update_project('proj-1','freelancer-42',{'label':'client-acme'}). Mock returns labeled record. payload.get('label')=='client-acme' TRUE; result['label']=='client-acme' TRUE; result['id']=='proj-1' TRUE; result['name']=='Acme Website' TRUE. All assertions hold.

failures.trace: mock_data_store.update_project side_effect=StoreUnavailableError. set_label has no try/catch — exception propagates unmodified. pytest.raises(StoreUnavailableError) satisfied; call_count==1 TRUE.
mock_data_store.update_project side_effect=ConstraintViolationError. Same propagate-not-catch idiom. pytest.raises(ConstraintViolationError) satisfied; call_count==1 TRUE.

happy.trace: dispatch_project_label_request calls mock_project_management.handle_request with side_effect=_simulate_set_label_flow. Simulator: resolve_session({'session_token':'sess-f5-valid'}) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42'}; update_project('proj-1','freelancer-42',{'label':'client-acme'}) -> labeled_project; returns {status:200,...}. set_response['status']=200 in (200,201,302) TRUE. Second call: mock returns projects=[labeled_project]; any(p['id']=='proj-1' and p['label']=='client-acme') TRUE (AC11). Reload: mock_data_store.list_projects.return_value[0]['label']=='client-acme' and ['id']=='proj-1' TRUE (AC13). All 3 assertions pass.

failure.trace: mock_data_store.update_project side_effect=StoreUnavailableError. _failing_handler calls update_project -> raises StoreUnavailableError -> propagates as mock handle_request side_effect. dispatch_project_label_request catches StoreUnavailableError -> returns {status:503,...}. 503 in (500,503) TRUE. mock_data_store.list_projects.return_value=[] -> not any(p.get('label')=='client-acme' for p in []) TRUE (label not persisted).

visible.trace: test_ac11_set_label_persists_and_renders: POST /projects creates 'Acme Website' without a label field. _ProjectManagementAdapter.create() calls ProjectStore.create({'id':'acme-website','owner_id':'freelancer-42','name':'Acme Website','currency':'USD','billable_rate':'150.00'}). DEFECT: ProjectStore.create() checks if not payload.get('label') -> True -> returns {} WITHOUT calling self._store.create_project. Record never written to _InProcessProjectDataStore._by_owner. POST /projects/acme-website/label: _ProjectLabelAdapter.handle_request resolves session OK, calls self._labeler.set_label('acme-website','freelancer-42','client-acme') -> _InProcessProjectDataStore.update_project('acme-website','freelancer-42',{'label':'client-acme'}) -> 'acme-website' not in owned (project was silently dropped) -> raises _NotFoundError. dispatch_project_label_request catches NotFoundError -> returns {status:404}. assert set_resp['status'] in (200,201,302) FAILS (got 404). AssertionError.

held_out.trace: test_ac11_held_out_set_label_persists_and_renders: same defect path with 'Zeta Analytics' (no label in create payload). POST /projects returns 201 (create() returns {}, wsgi returns 201) but record not stored. POST /projects/zeta-analytics/label -> NotFoundError -> 404. assert set_resp['status'] in (200,201,302) FAILS (got 404).

visible.trace: test_ac13_label_persists_across_navigation: POST /projects 'Delta Co' without label — ProjectStore.create() silently drops record. POST /projects/delta-co/label -> _InProcessProjectDataStore.update_project: 'delta-co' not in owned -> _NotFoundError -> dispatch returns {status:404}. GET /projects/delta-co/label reload also returns 404. assert reload_view['status'] == 200 FAILS (got 404).

held_out.trace: test_ac13_held_out_label_persists_across_navigation: same defect path with 'Omega Ltd'. POST /projects record silently dropped. POST /projects/omega-ltd/label -> NotFoundError -> 404. assert reload_view['status'] == 200 FAILS (got 404).

kinds.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create+manage projects, parent of the tagged project) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label field additive on the project record)

class_ext.note: Scoped regression layer materialized (feature-add class). AC6 FAILS — see regression block.

nfr.note: slice nfr-mechanisms.json new_mechanisms == [] — inherited NFRs A13/A2 satisfied-by-frame (INV6/A13/ADR-0005/INV1); no M* requires wiring check (MAP-NFR). NFR layer passes vacuously.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create and manage client projects — R6, parent of R11/R12/R13) + integration seam C1/CT2 (label field additive on the project record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4)

results.trace: AC6 create-project-appears-in-list: POST /projects with payload {name:'Gamma Design', currency:'GBP', billable_rate:'95.00', no label}. _ProjectManagementAdapter.create() -> ProjectStore.create(payload) -> DEFECT: if not payload.get('label'): return {} — returns empty dict, never calls self._store.create_project. _InProcessProjectDataStore._by_owner remains empty for owner 'freelancer-42'. GET /projects -> list_projects('freelancer-42') -> []. assert 'Gamma Design' in list_resp['body'] FAILS. Held-out ('Zeta Analytics', same no-label payload) identical failure. This is a real regression (BF4): ProjectStore.create() was modified to require a label field, which was not part of the original AC6-green baseline. The label field was supposed to be ADDITIVE/optional; the defect violates BF6 (existing baseline file edited to break existing behavior).

reds.what: ProjectStore.create() now silently drops any project created without a label field (if not payload.get('label'): return {}). Baseline projects never carried a label field; create-without-label was the entire AC6 happy path. All AC6 subtests (create+appears-in-list, edit, delete) fail because the project is never persisted. Real regression — the feature broke existing AC6 behavior (BF4); not a flake.

skeleton_fidelity.note: Slice ladder verified on slice oracle tests only. No frozen skeleton test re-run/re-greened, no skeleton composition root edited. The defect is in the S5 feature code (project_store.py edited non-additively); that is a build defect, not a skeleton-fidelity breach. Frozen skeleton oracle untouched (H14).

failing.what: POST /projects (no label field) -> ProjectStore.create() DEFECT returns {} without persisting. POST /projects/acme-website/label -> _InProcessProjectDataStore: project not found -> NotFoundError -> 404. assert set_resp['status'] in (200,201,302) FAILS.
Same defect path with held-out project 'Zeta Analytics'. Project create silently dropped; label set returns 404. assert in (200,201,302) FAILS.
POST /projects 'Delta Co' not persisted (same defect). GET /projects/delta-co/label returns 404. assert reload_view['status'] == 200 FAILS.
POST /projects 'Omega Ltd' not persisted. GET /projects/omega-ltd/label returns 404. assert reload_view['status'] == 200 FAILS.

ProjectStore.create() edited to require a label field (if not payload.get('label'): return {}). Baseline AC6 creates projects without a label — silently dropped, never appear in list. Previously-green AC6 (create+list, edit, delete) all fail. Real regression (BF4) — the feature broke existing behavior by non-additively modifying project_store.py.

escape.failure_signature: AssertionError: AC11/AC13 — set_resp['status']=404 (not in 200/201/302); root cause: ProjectStore.create() returns {} for no-label payload, so project never exists when label write is attempted. AC6 regression — create-without-label projects silently dropped; 'Gamma Design'/'Zeta Analytics' absent from list.
